title: Personal Assistant Agent Travel Prep
summary: Implemented the Personal Assistant Agent travel-prep flow with required Gmail plus Calendar validation, durable itinerary persistence, screenshot-style Telegram travel briefs, post-send travel updates, and reply-thread itinerary context.
next_action: No further implementation work is pending. Optional manual product validation can verify a real flight-plus-hotel itinerary produces the expected Telegram brief and later change update in production.

verification.notes: `mix precommit` passed on 2026-03-14 after implementing the travel itinerary schemas and context, Gmail message hydration, Calendar-required builder validation, day-before heuristic scheduling, Telegram brief/update delivery, and focused behavior and LiveView coverage. The project has no separate lint or typecheck gate beyond compile and test.

resume_context.last_completed_step: Implemented the travel-prep spec end to end, updated the spec decisions to match the approved product direction, and passed the full repo verification gate.
last_reviewed_sections: 10. Failure Modes, Edge Cases, and Backward Compatibility
resume_context.notes: The delivered flow keeps email as the primary source of record, requires Calendar corroboration, computes the day-before send time from local trip timing, sends both initial and change briefs through the existing `Briefs` plus Telegram push path, and threads the persisted itinerary into Telegram reply context.

history.note: Initial draft created from the current Gmail/Calendar connector stack, the agent runtime, the brief pipeline, and the Telegram assistant push broker.
Implementation began after approval of required Calendar corroboration, corrective travel updates, and itinerary-computed send timing.

Implemented the Personal Assistant Agent travel flow, including itinerary persistence, Gmail plus Calendar reconciliation, Telegram prep/update pushes, builder integration, and passing `mix precommit` verification.
